title: Subscription Checkout
warning_message: When sending, you MUST include the MEMO. Without him, the transfer will be lost!
send_amount: Send {{amount}} {{currency}} (excluding fees) to the address below within the remaining time
success_title: Congratulations, your subscription has been successfully paid!
success_email_note: Login details for the community will be sent to your email within a few minutes. If you don't see the email, please check your spam folder. You can start using the scanner right now.
